name: lookupDistObjReference
title: lookupDistObjReference
description: Obtains a reference by using a string.
A downcast can be used to get a more concrete type.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Fully qualified name of the reference.

return:
Reference with the given path.
Invalid reference if nothing was found.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
